narrative:
Swanton Fulton (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
